name: WF-Reengage

parameters.subject: =We miss you at BFC, {{ $json.full_name || $json.name }}
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $json.full_name || $json.name }},

We noticed you haven't been in for a while and wanted to check in.

Life gets busy — we get it. But the mats are always here when you're ready.

If there's anything that stopped you from coming in, we'd genuinely love to hear from you. Just reply to this email.

Your membership can be reactivated anytime:
https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

Hope to see you soon,
BFC

parameters.subject: =We'd love to have you back, {{ $('Extract Member').item.json.full_name || $('Extract Member').item.json.name }}
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Extract Member').item.json.full_name || $('Extract Member').item.json.name }},

We wanted to reach out one more time because we genuinely miss having you around.

If you're thinking about coming back, just reply to this email and we'll make it easy for you. No pressure, no hard sell — just a conversation.

The coaches and community are still here, and the door is always open.

https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

BFC

parameters.subject: =Last one from us, {{ $('Extract Member').item.json.full_name || $('Extract Member').item.json.name }}
parameters.message:
=Hey {{ $('Extract Member').item.json.full_name || $('Extract Member').item.json.name }},

This is the last email from us — we don't want to fill up your inbox.

If you ever want to come back, the door is always open. We'd love to have you.

https://bfc-echo.vercel.app/join

Take care,
BFC

notes:
SETUP:
1. Connect your Gmail account in Credentials
2. Set N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable in n8n (Settings → Variables)
3. Copy this workflow's webhook URL and paste into N8N_REENGAGE_WEBHOOK_URL in Vercel
4. Activate the workflow

Payload received: { members: [{ id, full_name, email, phone }] }

This workflow sends a 3-email re-engagement sequence over 7 days:
- Day 0: 'We miss you' email
- Day 3: Special offer (first week back free)
- Day 7: Final nudge

The BFC platform triggers this daily via /api/reengage, passing all lapsed members
not already contacted in the last 30 days.
